channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Secretary of State reports significant progress on Iran peace deal
Posobiec on Newsmax: Left promoting 'assassination culture'
item.description: Jack Posobiec, a Turning Point USA contributor and former Navy intelligence officer, told Newsmax on Sunday that left-wing rhetoric is fueling a culture of assassination against President Trump.

item.title: Watch: Platner further embarrasses himself when confronted about latest offensive remark
Hassett: No warning signs for national economy
item.description: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett dismissed concerns about emerging economic warning signs on Sunday, despite recent market fluctuations.
